profile_summary: Business traveler (mid budget) prioritizing central location, quietness.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Magnolia, Lima ranks #1 for this traveler on central location (+0.92), quietness (+0.86), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect."

supporting_evidence.quote: Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect.
Slept beautifully — very quiet despite being central.
Soundproofing was superb, not a peep from the street.
